case_title: ATKINSON, GORDON VS TOPCUBASI, BIANCA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ATKINSON, GORDON AS TO DEFENDANT TOPCUBASI, BIANCA TOPCUBASI, TEOMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFT TOPCUBASI RETURNED NO FILING FEE. SENT SCF #35.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-28-2000, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-31-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT T.TOPCUBASI REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE HEARING DATE TO THE END OF JANUARY 2001 SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DEFT. PAID $10.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATKINSON, GORDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOPCUBASI, BIANCA TOPCUBASI, TEOMAN $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,548.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOPCUBASI, BIANCA
